parallel-checksum.note: Scores 0 across ALL models and ALL skill variants (targeted, optimized). Likely a test evaluation/pattern-matching bug — the agent produces correct output but tests fail to match.

parallel-wordcount.note: Matches best targeted baseline. Iteration 1 scored low because model used regex+lowercase; fixed by adding explicit split() instruction.

changesMade: Removed redundant sections: Loop-to-Map Transformation, Output Ordering table, Resource Management (manual cleanup), Error Handling, Performance tuning details, ProcessPoolExecutor section
Merged decision framework and ordering into single Quick Reference table
Kept two key patterns (file checksums, word counting) as complete runnable examples with __name__ guard
Kept critical warnings: no shared mutable state, context manager usage
Added IMPORTANT WORKFLOW section: write script immediately, use python3, don't read data files with tools
Added explicit rule: use f.read().split() for word counting, not regex/lowercase
Removed chunksize tuning tip (not needed for task-relevant file counts)
